profiles_update_policy.name: profiles_update_policy
profiles_update_policy.using:
id = auth.uid()
        OR (
          (select auth.jwt() ->> 'user_role') IN ('owner', 'office')
          AND org_id = (select auth.jwt() ->> 'org_id')::uuid
        )
profiles_update_policy.withCheck:
id = auth.uid()
        OR (
          (select auth.jwt() ->> 'user_role') IN ('owner', 'office')
          AND org_id = (select auth.jwt() ->> 'org_id')::uuid
        )
